results.title: Janesville considering an update to affordable housing fund policy to broaden how money is distributed
results.description: The City of Janesville is considering changes to its affordable housing fund policy to broaden how the city can use the money. The changes would allow the city to support a wider range of affordable housing projects as community needs...

results.title: Turkish governor fired for wearing tight cycling shorts that were ‘too snug’
results.description: Mehmet Fatih Cicekli, the governor of Ardahan province in eastern Turkey, was removed from his post by a presidential decree signed by President Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

results.title: Diocese of Buffalo sells 3 properties for $4.6m to help fund clergy sex abuse settlement
results.description: The proceeds from the sale will help pay for a $150 million abuse settlement for over 800 clerical sex abuse victims.
